name: ECHO-modules
summary: Python package for analyzing US Environmental Protection Agency datasets including Enforcement and Compliance History Online (ECHO), Risk Screening Environmental Indicators (RSEI), and EJSCREEN
author_email: Steve Hansen <steven.e.hansen@gmail.com>, Eric Nost <enost@uoguelph.ca>, Sung-Gheel Jang <sunggheel.jang@stonybrook.edu>, Yemoe Aung <enost@uoguelph.ca>, Kelsey Breseman <ye.m.aung@stonybrook.edu>, EDGI <contact@envirodatagov.org>
